title: STONEBORN - Ice and Fire
description: Ice and Fire in a STONEBORN style
body:
[I&F: RLCraft Edition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iceandfire-rlcraft) containers resources in [STONEBORN](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stoneborn) style

![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pJeQEwiS/images/3895f920f5a3cc6c8d12c965edda25f7c3e028c7.png)

This resource-pack is part of the [STONEBORN - Legacy Support](https://modrinth.com/collection/njlR2Sor) collection
